extraction.one_line_summary: MÜHLBERGER attacked with 1km to go from a four-rider group, held off SCHACHMANN and ŠTYBAR's late chase through the Tom Dumoulin bike park
tactical_patterns: MÜHLBERGER's 1km solo attack succeeded because Quick-Step commitment split between SCHACHMANN chase duty and ŠTYBAR positioning.
VAN AVERMAET and MATTHEWS lost time in chasing group despite being marked favorites, revealing weakness after 120km attrition.
Final kilometer attack timing through technical bike park neutralized Quick-Step's numerical two-rider breakaway advantage.

rider_signals.MÜHLBERGER Gregor: positive: won first WorldTour stage from unexpected breakaway position after admitting it was hardest stage he'd raced
rider_signals.SCHACHMANN Maximilian: neutral: Quick-Step's two riders in break couldn't convert numbers advantage when MÜHLBERGER attacked late
rider_signals.ŠTYBAR Zdeněk: neutral: salvaged third but Quick-Step's dual presence failed to control final kilometer
rider_signals.WELLENS Tim: neutral: took second from breakaway group but lacked acceleration to follow MÜHLBERGER's decisive move
rider_signals.VAN AVERMAET Greg: negative: lost time from chasing group despite being expected to contend after 120km of attrition
rider_signals.MATTHEWS Michael: negative: gapped with VAN AVERMAET from chase group, suggesting cumulative fatigue from week-long racing
